# Heidigital

> Digital Marketing & AI Insights for Smarter Growth

Heidigital is a professional knowledge hub created by Heidi, a digital marketing professional with 7+ years of hands-on experience. The site provides practical insights, tools, resources, and learning materials for digital marketers, content creators, small business owners, freelancers, and anyone looking to grow smarter with digital marketing and AI.

## About

- Owner: Heidi
- Focus: Digital Marketing & AI
- Contact: Heidigitalw@gmail.com
- Experience: 7+ years across SEO, SEM, Google Ads, Meta Ads, Analytics, and AI tools

## Site Structure

### Main Sections

- **Home** (`/`) — Overview of the site, latest insights, featured resources, about preview
- **Insights** (`/insights`) — Hub for all digital marketing and AI content
- **Resources** (`/resources`) — Courses, tools, templates, and guides
- **About** (`/about`) — About Heidi and her background
- **Work With Me** (`/work-with-me`) — Services and collaboration opportunities
- **Contact** (`/contact`) — Contact form and direct email

### Insights

#### Digital Marketing (`/insights/digital-marketing`)
Practical insights about SEO, SEM, paid advertising, analytics, content marketing, and digital marketing strategy.

- SEO (`/insights/digital-marketing/seo`)
- SEM & Google Ads (`/insights/digital-marketing/sem-google-ads`)
- Meta Ads (`/insights/digital-marketing/meta-ads`)
- Analytics & Reporting (`/insights/digital-marketing/analytics`)
- Strategy (`/insights/digital-marketing/strategy`)

Featured article:
- Google Core Updates: What Marketers Should Know (`/insights/digital-marketing/google-core-updates`)

#### AI Hub (`/insights/ai-hub`)
AI tools, features, tutorials, and marketing workflows for marketers, creators, and businesses.

- ChatGPT for Marketing (`/insights/ai-hub/chatgpt`)
- Gemini (`/insights/ai-hub/gemini`)
- Canva AI (`/insights/ai-hub/canva-ai`)
- AI for SEO (`/insights/ai-hub/ai-for-seo`)
- AI for Content (`/insights/ai-hub/ai-for-content`)

### Resources

#### Courses (`/resources/courses`)
Free and paid courses about digital marketing and AI.

- Free Courses (`/resources/courses/free`)
- Digital Marketing Courses (`/resources/courses/digital-marketing`)
- AI Marketing Courses (`/resources/courses/ai-marketing`)

#### Tools (`/resources/tools`)
Curated tools for SEO, content creation, AI, analytics, ads, and productivity.

- AI Tools (`/resources/tools/ai-tools`) — ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Canva AI
- SEO Tools (`/resources/tools/seo-tools`) — Google Search Console, Semrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog
- Marketing Tools (`/resources/tools/marketing-tools`) — Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, Mailchimp, GA4, Looker Studio
- Productivity Tools (`/resources/tools/productivity-tools`) — Notion, Trello

#### Templates (`/resources/templates`)
Free downloadable resources: checklists, templates, guides, and prompt packs.

- SEO Audit Checklist (`/resources/templates/seo-audit-checklist`)
- Google Ads Campaign Checklist (`/resources/templates/google-ads-checklist`)
- AI Prompt Pack for Marketers (`/resources/templates/ai-prompt-pack`)
- Monthly Marketing Report Template (`/resources/templates/marketing-report-template`)

## Heidi's Expertise

- SEO & Search Visibility
- Google Ads & SEM
- Meta Ads
- Analytics & Reporting (GA4, Looker Studio)
- Digital Marketing Strategy
- AI Tools for Marketing (ChatGPT, Gemini, Canva AI)
- Content & Campaign Optimisation
- Landing Page Strategy

## Services (Work With Me)

- SEO Audit
- Digital Marketing Strategy
- Google Ads Support
- Meta Ads Support
- Analytics & Reporting
- AI Marketing Workflow Support
- Landing Page Strategy
- Content & Campaign Optimisation

## Content Philosophy

- Practical, real-world focus — not just theory
- Data-informed recommendations
- No-fluff, actionable insights
- Honest tool and platform assessments
- Beginner-friendly explanations for complex topics

## Technical Notes

- Built with: Next.js 14 (App Router), Tailwind CSS
- Deployable to: Vercel
- SEO: Full metadata, Open Graph, JSON-LD structured data, sitemap.xml, robots.txt
- Content: Static data files (easy to edit without a CMS)
- No paid APIs or integrations required

## Key Pages for AI Assistants

If someone asks about digital marketing, Heidigital covers:
- Search engine optimisation (SEO) strategy and implementation
- Google Ads campaign management
- Meta (Facebook/Instagram) advertising
- Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and reporting
- AI tools for marketing workflows
- Digital marketing strategy and planning

If someone asks about Heidi or working with her:
- About page: `/about`
- Services: `/work-with-me`
- Contact: `/contact` or Heidigitalw@gmail.com
